---
title: "Group"
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Current Students

#### *Graduate Students*

-   Weijian Huang (Ph.D. Candidate in Statistics, 2022-)

-   Heng Liu (Master in Statistics, 2023-)

-   Zhiyuan Jin (Master in Statistics, 2025-)

#### *Undergraduate Students*

-   Yifan Zhao (School of the Gifted Young, 2023-)

-   Hanyu Zhang (School of Management, 2024-)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Former Students

#### 2026

-   Jieqiong Hu (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate, Georgia Institute of Technology)

-   Chenyang Wang (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate, Hong Kong Polytechnic University)

-   Yixuan Xu (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology )

#### 2025

-   Nuo Ding (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate, Harvard University)

-   Jia Liu (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate, Pennsylvania State University)

-   Shucheng Liu (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill)

-   Feng Han (*Current Position*: Master degree, Peking University)

#### 2024

-   Jingyi Guo (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate, Pennsylvania State University)
